title: daviesia filipes subsp. filipes
intro: Daviesia filipes subsp. filipes is a plant species of the pea family (Fabaceae), also known as woolly bitter pea, and is native to Australia. The medicinal properties of Daviesia filipes subsp. filipes include its antibacterial, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating skin conditions and wounds. Daviesia filipes subsp. filipes has been used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
